.github/.purpose: verify hosted workflow runs the same lanes as local (parity)

.github/**.purpose: verify hosted workflow runs the same lanes as local (parity)

.github/workflows/.purpose: verify hosted workflow runs the same lanes as local (parity)

.gitignore.purpose: verify the generated-zone exclusions stay consistent with agent/generated-zones.toml

AGENTS.md.purpose: verify split metadata and agent maps

CHANGELOG.md.purpose: verify release notes stay routed through the score lane

Cargo.lock.purpose: verify the locked dependency graph still builds and tests green

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify the engine pin/patch wiring builds and the gate stays green

Justfile.purpose: verify the canonical local command wrappers stay reproducible

VERSION.purpose: verify version source stays aligned with release evidence

agent/.purpose: verify agent metadata parses and routes proof lanes

deny.toml.purpose: verify the dependency-review policy stays parseable and enforced in CI

docs/.purpose: verify agent-readable docs remain routed and auditable

fixtures/.purpose: verify the dossier selftest fixture stays valid

fixtures/**.purpose: verify the dossier selftest fixture stays valid

ops/.command: just check && just score && just security
ops/.purpose: verify the CI gate scripts parse and stay reproducible

ops/**.command: just check && just score && just security
ops/**.purpose: verify the CI gate scripts parse and stay reproducible

ops/ci/.command: just check && just score && just security
ops/ci/.purpose: verify each CI lane script parses and runs at local/CI parity

ops/git-hooks/.command: just check && just score && just security
ops/git-hooks/.purpose: verify the pre-push hook delegates to the same local lanes

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify the Rust finder builds clean (fmt/clippy/test) and the pipeline tests stay green

scripts/.purpose: verify the gate wrapper shells parse and route the same lanes

scripts/**.purpose: verify the gate wrapper shells parse and route the same lanes

src/.purpose: verify the Rust finder builds clean (fmt/clippy/test) and the pipeline tests stay green

src/**.purpose: verify the Rust finder builds clean (fmt/clippy/test) and the pipeline tests stay green

tests/.purpose: verify the Rust finder builds clean (fmt/clippy/test) and the pipeline tests stay green

tests/**.purpose: verify the Rust finder builds clean (fmt/clippy/test) and the pipeline tests stay green
